parameters.content:
## AG_00 — Entrypoint Supervisor
**Classifier model:** claude-sonnet-4-6 | **Max tokens:** 512
**API:** HTTP → api.anthropic.com/v1/messages

### Credential Required
- Create a **Header Auth** credential named **ANTHROPIC_HTTP_HEADER_AUTH**
  - Header name: `x-api-key`
  - Header value: your Anthropic API key

### Webhooks
- POST /ag/supervisor/entry
- POST /ag/supervisor/clarification-reply
- POST /ag/supervisor/approval
- **POST /ag/supervisor/status** ← async status poll endpoint

## REQUIRED: Update Workflow IDs After Import

For each Execute Workflow node, open it and set the workflow ID
(URL: /workflow/XXXXXXX after opening each workflow).

### Pre-filled placeholders (replace with real IDs):
- AG_01_PRODUCT_DISCOVERY → all nodes named "Execute AG_01 (*)"
- AG_02_SOLUTION_ARCHITECT → all nodes named "Execute AG_02 (*)"
- AG_03_TECH_LEAD → all nodes named "Execute AG_03 (*)"
- AG_05_DELIVERY_PLANNER → all nodes named "Execute AG_05 (*)"
- AG_08_QA_REVIEWER → Execute AG_08 (QA)
- AG_09_DEV_INTELLIGENCE → Execute AG_09 (DevIntel)
- AG_10_RESPONSE_FORMATTER → Execute AG_10 (Formatter)

### NEW — must be filled manually after import:
- **AG_04_UX_UI_PLANNER** → Execute AG_04 (SD) and Execute AG_04 (FPF)
- **AG_06_FRONTEND_ENGINEER** → Execute AG_06 (Impl) and Execute AG_06 (FPF)
- **AG_07_BACKEND_ENGINEER** → Execute AG_07 (Impl) and Execute AG_07 (FPF)

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify($json.apiBody) }}

parameters.content:
## Async Execution — AG11-First Architecture

**Entry Flow:**
BRANCH A — Fast Ack: Code - Store Initial Status → Code - Build Entry Response → Respond to Webhook - Entry (HTTP 202)
BRANCH B — Long Exec: Code - Store Initial Status → HTTP AG11 Save Start → HTTP AG11 Verify Start → IF Start Verified OK → classification → routing → personas → QA → DevIntel → Formatter → Code - Store Final Result → IF Final Status → [AG11 Mark Failed | AG11 Save Completion] → AG11 Verify Snapshot → Code - Build Verified Response

**AG11 is the ONLY source of truth. Static data is NOT used.**

**Start-of-run write (fail loud):**
- AG11 Save Start: POST /save-step-result (step: supervisor_started, no continueOnFail)
- AG11 Verify Start: POST /latest-snapshot (continueOnFail: true so IF can branch)
- IF Start Verified OK: true → classify | false → AG11 Mark Start Failed (terminal)

**Final write (fail loud):**
- AG11 Mark Failed / Save Completion: no continueOnFail — hard failure if AG11 unreachable
- AG11 Verify Snapshot: POST /latest-snapshot (continueOnFail: true for branching)
- Code - Build Verified Response: returns structured success or explicit verification failure

**Status endpoint /ag/supervisor/status:**
- Queries AG11 /latest-snapshot live (HTTP Request - AG11 Status Query)
- Returns AG11 state directly — never reads from static data
- If AG11 returns no record or error: explicit not_found / verification_error response

**Execution statuses:** processing | completed | failed | not_found
⚠ ChatGPT must NOT assume success until AG11 confirms status = completed

parameters.content:
## AG_11 Integration Notes

**AG11 base URL:** `https://divazuc.app.n8n.cloud/webhook/ag/project/...`
**project_id:** `6gQXa9oUAJVQi85J` (static, hardcoded in all AG11 HTTP nodes)

**Endpoints used:**
- /state — load project state at entry
- /create-or-resume — auto-create if not found
- /save-step-result — start-of-run, per-step Pack writes, final completion
- /mark-step-failed — on start/step/final verify failure, on execution failure
- /latest-snapshot — verification after every critical write; also used for status polling

**Per-step persistence is now GATED (not dead-end only):**
- Pack Discovery → save discovery_completed → verify → IF → {true: Gate OK → Merge | false: Gate Failed + mark-step-failed}
- Pack SD → save system_design_completed → verify → IF → {true: Gate OK → Merge | false: Gate Failed + mark-step-failed}
- Pack Impl → save implementation_planning_completed → verify → IF → {true: Gate OK → Merge | false: Gate Failed + mark-step-failed}
- Pack FPF → save full_product_flow_completed → verify → IF → {true: Gate OK → Merge | false: Gate Failed + mark-step-failed}
- Pack Default → save default_flow_completed → verify → IF → {true: Gate OK → Merge | false: Gate Failed + mark-step-failed}

**Execution rule:**
A branch reaches `Merge - Collect Outputs` only after AG11 persistence verification passes.

**Verification semantics (per-step IFs — 3 conditions AND):**
- Check 1: `$json.success === true` (boolean)
- Check 2: `$json.data` exists and is not null
- Check 3: `$json.data.last_completed_step === expected_step_name` (e.g. 'discovery_completed')
- `Code - Build Verified Response` (final snapshot): also checks `data.status` is a non-empty string

**continueOnFail rules:**
- Save nodes (all writes): NO continueOnFail — fail loud
- Verify nodes: continueOnFail: true — allows IF to branch on AG11/network failure
- Load State, Create Project: continueOnFail: true — entry is best-effort
